_comment: Site-wide flags. zhPublished gates the Simplified-Chinese /zh/ locale: while false (Phase 1b), every /zh/ page is noindex, no hreflang is emitted anywhere, and /zh/ stays out of sitemap.xml. While true (published), the index/competition pairs carry reciprocal hreflang (en/zh-Hans/x-default), the /zh/ pages drop noindex, and sitemap.xml lists the /zh/ URLs with per-pair xhtml:link alternates.
